guardrails: This package prepares A4 reviewer inputs only; it does not record A4 acceptance.
Every packaged item remains pending_a4_review until an A4 ux-acceptance-reviewer records a separate decision.
W1.5.199 refreshes the package with selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail evidence, but does not record A4 acceptance.
No package field may contain raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, or full destination paths.

package_scope.excluded_reason: Partial runtime bridge items require follow-up implementation or stronger end-to-end proof before A4 review packaging.

acceptance_inputs: Visual-smoke matrix known desktop/mobile cases
Collapsed stream metrics remain visible without body panels
Expanded stream metrics prove disclosure behavior
